matches.rationale: The Bash rule targets git commit, and its name and evidence explicitly prohibit committing directly on master.

The Bash trigger includes git commit and the evidence requires /qa-pr before committing. The same extraction also mentions push and FAIL, but under the 1:1 rule it is assigned to the closest gold rule indicated by its name.

misses.note: No extracted rule requires checking the current branch before a commit; the master-commit prohibition does not encode the branch-check action.
No extracted rule targets the conditional stop-and-create-a-branch workflow after the branch check reports master.
The combined qa-pr-before-commit extraction includes push, but it can be used only once and is closest to g4; there is no separate extracted push rule.
The FAIL prohibition appears only inside the evidence of the combined qa-pr-before-commit rule, which is already assigned to g4; there is no separate extracted FAIL-triggered rule.
No extracted Bash rule binds the stated Node and Yarn version requirements to project commands.
Compiler self-reported skip: ".claude/ 리소스를 cwd에서 못 찾으면 상위 디렉토리로 올라가며 탐색하는 일반 검색 전략 — 특정 액션 트리거로 바인딩하기 어려움"

unmatched_extracted.note: This is a real action-bindable TypeScript import-content rule in the document, but no frozen gold rule lists it.
This is a real action-bindable page-content rule in the document, but no frozen gold rule lists it.
